exercises.title: Platform Comparison Tool
exercises.description: Build a tool to compare hardware platforms for QEC suitability.
tasks: Include gate times, error rates, connectivity
Estimate required physical qubits for target code
hints: QEC cycle time ≈ d × max(gate_time, readout_time)

exercises.title: Error Budget Calculator
exercises.description: Calculate error budgets for different platforms.
tasks: Input: platform parameters (gate errors, T1, T2)
Model error accumulation in QEC cycle
Break down by source (gates, idle, measurement)
hints: Gate errors sum over all gates in cycle

exercises.title: Connectivity Mapper
exercises.description: Map surface code to different hardware connectivities.
tasks: Calculate routing overhead for distant qubits
hints: Surface code: each qubit connects to 4 neighbors
Trapped ions: full connectivity in zone
SWAP gates add overhead for routing

exercises.title: Qubit Count Estimator
exercises.description: Estimate physical qubit requirements for QEC.
tasks: Input: number of logical qubits, target error rate
Compute physical qubits for data + ancilla
Add overhead for magic state factories
